Crisis Misinformation Analyzer

CrisisVerify AI

Paste a crisis-related claim and get a clear verdict, confidence score, and a few simple reasons. This is designed for war and emergency misinformation, not general fact checking.

Analyze a Claim

Enter a war or crisis-related headline, forwarded message, or social post.

What the app checks

  • Whether the source looks official, anonymous, or suspicious
  • Whether old images or videos may be reused out of context
  • Whether trusted reporting supports or contradicts the claim
  • Whether the language sounds exaggerated or manipulative

Before you trust the result

  • Use this for crisis claims, not general political facts
  • Treat the output as a decision aid, not final truth
  • Always cross-check high-risk claims with trusted sources

Prediction

The app analyzed the claim and found the strongest matching signal pattern.

Verdict
Unverified
Confidence
0%
Risk level
Needs verification

Why the app predicted this

This claim looks outside the app's crisis-misinformation scope, so the system should not guess.

No result yet.

Key signals

  • Run an analysis to see the strongest signals.

Recommended next checks

  • Cross-check the claim with trusted local or international reporting.
  • Verify whether any attached media is old or reused.
  • Inspect whether the source is official, spoofed, or anonymous.
